title: Data Preparation
selectProject: Select a project to manage data

import.title: Import Files
import.hint: Import .txt, .jsonl, or .json files as training data source.

files.emptyHint: Import text files to get started

clean.title: One-Click Clean
clean.hint: Remove noise, fix encoding, deduplicate, and normalize your text files.

generate.title: Generate Dataset
generate.hint: Generate training dataset from cleaned text automatically.
generate.mode_qa_desc: Extract knowledge from text to generate Q&A pairs. Ideal for building knowledge bases and FAQ training data.
generate.mode_style_desc: Analyze the writing style and generate new content imitating it. Ideal for training models to learn a specific author's style.
generate.mode_chat_desc: Generate multi-turn conversations based on text content. Ideal for training dialogue and context understanding.
generate.mode_instruct_desc: Convert text into instruction-output pairs covering summarization, analysis, reasoning, etc. Ideal for general instruction fine-tuning.
generate.modeCheckTitle: Mode Compatibility Check (Based on Current File Types)
generate.modeCheckGeneralHint: Text-based content detected. All four modes are usable; style imitation works best on coherent prose.
generate.modeCheckProseHint: Narrative prose detected. Style Imitation and Knowledge Q&A are recommended.
generate.modeCheckDialogueHint: Dialogue content detected. Multi-turn Chat and Knowledge Q&A are recommended.
generate.modeCheckNoFiles: Import files first to get mode recommendations.
generate.modeCheckStructuredHint: Structured data detected (e.g. JSON/CSV). Knowledge Q&A or Instruction mode recommended.
generate.installOllamaHint: Install Ollama to use AI for higher quality dataset generation
generate.builtinHint: Uses rule-based extraction to generate training data. No AI model needed, fast but limited quality.
generate.ollamaHint: Uses local Ollama LLM for high-quality training data generation. 7B+ models recommended.
generate.lmstudioHint: Uses LM Studio local server for high-quality training data generation. Start the server in LM Studio first.
generate.lmstudioScanGuide: The list below shows locally installed LM Studio models (from ~/.lmstudio/models/). If empty, download models in the LM Studio app first, then click Refresh.
generate.lmstudioNotRunning: LM Studio server is not running
generate.lmstudioNotRunningHint: Start LM Studio and enable the local server to use AI generation.
generate.privacyFilterHint: Mask phone numbers, emails and IDs with placeholders.
generate.fuzzyDedupHint: Remove near-duplicate paragraphs by similarity threshold.
generate.noModeSelected: Please select a generation mode first

preview.title: Preview
preview.noContent: Select a file to preview its content
preview.binaryEmpty: No text could be extracted from this document. It may be a scanned image PDF or a protected file.

section.selectFilesHint: Import the raw documents you want to use for training (supports txt, md, docx, pdf, JSON, and more). After import, the system auto-cleans the text and segments it into chunks, then uses AI to generate structured training data pairs. This is step one — higher quality source files lead to better training results.
section.genMethodHint: Choose how to turn your documents into training data: AI generation (Ollama) uses a local large model to understand your content and produce high-quality Q&A/dialogue pairs — great for quality-sensitive use cases; built-in rules are extremely fast with no AI needed, extracting structured content via rules — ideal for quick tests or well-formatted data.
section.genTypeHint: Choose based on what you want the model to learn: Q&A — have the model master knowledge from your documents and answer questions; Style Imitation — replicate the writing style and tone of your documents; Multi-turn Chat — train a conversation assistant for continuous dialogues; Instruction Following — teach the model to complete specific tasks on demand.
section.datasetsHint: All generated training dataset versions are listed here. Each generation run creates a new version, making it easy to compare results with different settings. Expand a version to see sample count, source files, and quality scores. Once you've picked a version, click the button below to go to the Training page.

dataset.noVersions: No datasets yet, generate one first

dropZone.hint: Drop files or folders here to import
dropZone.supportedFormats: Supported formats: txt, md, docx, pdf, json, jsonl

mergeToggle.label: Merge as Single Dataset
mergeToggle.hint: When enabled, all files are merged into one final training set output. When disabled, each file generates its own separate dataset.

previewTab.dataHint: The data preview shows AI-generated training samples in real time. During generation it streams live AI output logs so you can monitor quality; after generation, click any file in the left list to preview its raw content.
previewTab.segmentHint: Smart segmentation is the prep step before generation: the system analyzes each file's type and structure, then splits long text into appropriately-sized chunks so the AI can process each piece efficiently. This tab shows segment count, character distribution, and the algorithm used — helping you verify the text is being split sensibly.

autoSegment.label: Smart Segmentation
autoSegment.hint: Automatically clean and segment text after file upload. Preview results in the right panel.

validation.needMethod: Please select a generation method first
validation.needModel: Please select an AI model first
validation.needMode: Please select a generation type first

segment.title: Smart Segmentation Preview (Auto)
segment.hint: The system auto-matches a segmentation strategy by file type and refreshes this preview after cleaning.
segment.empty: No segments yet. Run cleaning or start generation first.

summary.strategyHint: The system automatically selects the best segmentation algorithm based on file content: Markdown segmentation for document-style content, code-aware segmentation for files with code, paragraph-balanced for general text, and fixed-length for strict length control.
